title: Largest consolidated (137 files); pre-merged Steps 3-7 bundles; "Workspace Restore"
public_claim: Largest consolidated (137 files); pre-merged Steps 3-7 bundles; "Workspace Restore" is a source packet for this is the largest consolidated handoff in the bundle — a single self-contained ZIP that bundles the consolidated Step 3-7 implementation pack, the execution support layer, and a full expanded copy of the governing replacement archive (not zipped inside, fully extracted into.
distinctive_mechanism: It converts an archive or handoff into three inspectable decisions: what the work product is for, which component pieces carry the work, and what action would turn it into a live room, paper, method, or software instrument.
